operational_contexts.name: Degraded navigation route execution
operational_contexts.description: Autonomy is evaluated while navigation confidence approaches the unsafe mission threshold.
constraints: prevent nominal route continuation under active navigation degradation

autonomy_functions.name: Autonomous route manager
autonomy_functions.description: Manages route execution while consuming navigation-confidence and power-margin telemetry.

operating_conditions.name: Navigation confidence telemetry available
operating_conditions.description: The runtime receives a normalized navigation-confidence signal.

stressors.name: Navigation confidence degradation
stressors.description: Navigation confidence falls below the mission threshold for nominal autonomous route execution.

expected_behaviors.description: Runtime gate forces safe-hold when degraded navigation is active.
expected_behaviors.rationale: Critical navigation uncertainty must block nominal autonomous route execution.

acceptance_criteria.statement: The scenario run satisfies the expected safe behavior and produces hashed evidence.

mission_threads.name: Navigation confidence assurance thread
mission_threads.objective: Keep autonomy bounded when navigation confidence is degraded.

scenarios.title: Active degraded navigation triggers safe-hold
scenarios.description: Evaluate whether the runtime enters safe-hold when navigation confidence is below the mission threshold.
